wanted to share the results from my experiment with you all, interpret them as you will. I made 10 different accounts over a month long period and used separate machines, each in their own unique location. Out of the 10 accounts, 8 of them were always ripped off in some way by a seller. The 2 that did not receive this treatment applied tags or parts from usernames that had large amounts of rep. If you're worried about getting spammed look for users that have a lot of rep and then make an account using a part of their name.
